SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.util

Class CommonsUtil

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.util.CommonsUtil
public class CommonsUtil extends Object
Small shared helpers across the failover core: null/emptiness checks, exception-chain inspection (finalRootCauseOf(java.lang.Throwable), canonicalTypeOf(java.lang.Throwable), messageOf(java.lang.Throwable)) and method identity (methodId(java.lang.reflect.Method)).

"Empty" is defined per type, which matters for scatter/gather where a recovered slice may be a collection, a map, or an array:

  • null → empty.
  • Collection → empty when it has no elements or every element is null (an all-null collection carries no usable data, so it is treated as empty).
  • Map → empty when it has no entries.
  • Object[] → empty only when its length is 0. Unlike collections, an array is not inspected element-by-element, so an array of all nulls is not considered empty.
  • Any other object (e.g. a String, a number, a POJO) → never empty, even the empty string "". Only null makes a non-container value "empty".
Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    canonicalTypeOf(Throwable throwable)
    Null-safe canonical class name; returns null for a null throwable.
    static Throwable
    finalRootCauseOf(Throwable throwable)
    Innermost cause of throwable.
    static boolean
    isNotNullOrEmpty(Object object)
    Inverse of isNullOrEmpty(Object) — true when the value carries usable data.
    static boolean
    isNullOrEmpty(Object obj)
    Returns whether the given value is null or "empty", where emptiness is type-specific (see the class javadoc for the exact rules).
    static String
    messageOf(Throwable throwable)
    Null-safe throwable message; returns null for a null throwable.
    static String
    methodId(@NonNull Method method)
    Intercepted method identity as SimpleClassName#methodName.

  • Constructor Details

    • CommonsUtil

      public CommonsUtil()

  • Method Details

    • isNotNullOrEmpty

      public static boolean isNotNullOrEmpty(Object object)
      Inverse of isNullOrEmpty(Object) — true when the value carries usable data.
      Parameters:
      object - the value to test (any type, may be null)
      Returns:
      true if object is non-null and not empty by the rules of isNullOrEmpty(Object)

    • isNullOrEmpty

      public static boolean isNullOrEmpty(Object obj)
      Returns whether the given value is null or "empty", where emptiness is type-specific (see the class javadoc for the exact rules).
      Parameters:
      obj - the value to test (any type, may be null)
      Returns:
      true if obj is null; an empty or all-null Collection; an empty Map; or a zero-length Object[]. false otherwise.

    • finalRootCauseOf

      public static Throwable finalRootCauseOf(Throwable throwable)
      Innermost cause of throwable. The aspect wraps every upstream failure (often several layers deep), so the real root cause is the deepest link in the chain. Returns null when throwable has no cause. Guards against a self-referential cause chain.

    • canonicalTypeOf

      public static String canonicalTypeOf(Throwable throwable)
      Null-safe canonical class name; returns null for a null throwable.

    • messageOf

      public static String messageOf(Throwable throwable)
      Null-safe throwable message; returns null for a null throwable.

    • methodId

      public static String methodId(@NonNull @NonNull Method method)
      Intercepted method identity as SimpleClassName#methodName.
